testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not create a session: The automation session ended unexpected while attempting to pair with it. testcase.name: givenWebpage_whenLogin_theSuccess
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not visible.
